_readme: Mawkib Clinic settings. Edit the values below, save, then restart the server (./start.sh). CHANGE THE PINS BEFORE GO-LIVE — these defaults are public on GitHub.
_admin_pin_help: Protects the Admin page: exports, stock, staff lists. Keep with the site lead.
_intake_exit_pin_help: Asked when someone tries to leave the Patient Intake Form screen.
_station_exit_pin_help: Asked when leaving the Doctor or Pharmacy screens.
_port_help: Leave at 8080 unless it conflicts with something else on the tablet.
_timezone_help: Leave blank to auto-detect the tablet's timezone (e.g. Asia/Baghdad). Or set it explicitly, e.g. "Asia/Baghdad".
